Our Location

BESUT,
TERENGGANU

NSJay Guest House

NSJay Guest House is located in Anak Ikan, Besut, Terengganu, in a peaceful and convenient area for guests.

Open in Google Maps

Guest House Layout

Spacious 3-Bedroom Homestay

Rent a full Semi-D house unit, perfect for families and groups looking for space, privacy, and convenience.

  • 🛏️
    3 Bedrooms
  • 🚿
    2 Bathrooms
  • ❄️
    Fully Air-Conditioned
  • 🍳
    Equipped Kitchen
  • 📺
    Smart TV
  • 🚗
    Private Parking (2 cars)

Cozy Tiny House Unit

Our modern tiny house offers a warm, fully air-conditioned bedroom, a comfortable living area with TV, and kitchen amenities. Ideal for couples or small families.

  • 🛏️Cozy Bedroom (1 Queen Bed)
  • 🛋️Living Hall with Sofa & TV
  • 🍽️Dining Set & Kettle
  • ❄️Fully Air-Conditioned
  • 🌀Ceiling Fans
  • 🚗Private Parking

How to Book

Follow these three simple steps to secure your stay with us.

1

Check Availability

Contact us via WhatsApp or phone call to check if your desired dates are available.

2

Confirm Booking Details

Provide us with guest details, duration of stay, and make a reservation deposit.

3

Welcome to Besut!

Receive check-in details and key collection instructions. Your cozy stay awaits!

Ready to book your cozy stay?

Direct WhatsApp booking guarantees the quickest response and the best local rates.

Chat on WhatsApp Call Direct

House Rules

Please observe our homestay guidelines to ensure a comfortable stay for everyone.

What's Welcome

  • ✔
    Dispose of garbage in the designated outdoor bins.
  • ✔
    Park vehicles responsibly within the gate.
  • ✔Dispose of garbage in the designated outdoor bins.
  • ✔Park vehicles responsibly within the gate.

What's Prohibited

  • ✘
    No loud parties or events after 11:00 PM.
  • ✘
    No illegal activities or hazardous items.
  • NNo loud parties or events after 11:00 PM.
  • ✘No illegal activities or hazardous items.
